meaning: n.香贝坦红葡萄酒(勃艮第酒的一种)
examples: Gevrey Chambertin owns largest area of vineyard and 55 hectare Grand Cru.
ABSTRACT: Gevrey Chambertin owns largest area of vineyard and 55 hectare Grand Cru.
Mark Haisma, who produces a Bourgogne Chardonnay outside of Gevrey-Chambertin, is one of the few who will speak openly.
